backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—hero section full-viewport image bleed and header scroll-hide with updated tagline—to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart, sidebar variables).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Header, HeroSection, MenuSection, CateringSection, ContactSection, and Footer into a single-page layout.
Catering section component displaying event type offerings, a banner image, an included-items checklist, and a CTA button scrolling to the contact section, styled for the Phoenix, Arizona market.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section displaying owner Jasmine Cota's profile, a clickable phone number, service area, and availability details inside a styled card.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact info (Jasmine Cota, phone, Phoenix AZ), copyright, and a 'Made with love in Phoenix, AZ' tagline.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with a logo, nav links, mobile hamburger menu, and auto-hide behavior based on scroll direction.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, logo, title, tagline, and CTA buttons for exploring the menu and booking catering.
frontend/src/components/MenuSection.tsx: Displays a grid of menu item cards (tacos, burritos, quesadillas, etc.) with images, descriptions, ingredient details, and optional badges.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, as the frontend is a static website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollDirection.ts: Custom hook that tracks scroll direction (up/down), current scroll position, and whether the page is at the top, using requestAnimationFrame for performance.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base styles, a Mexican-inspired OKLCH color palette for light/dark modes, and custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, a Mexican-inspired color palette (chili, sienna, gold, verde, cream), box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for a Mexican food website, recording two existing features (full-bleed hero image and scrollable header with 'Delicious Mexican Food' tagline) and two pending architectural requests mirroring those features.
